_publications._publicationTitle: The ErbB inhibitors trastuzumab and erlotinib inhibit growth of vestibular schwannoma xenografts in nude mice: a preliminary study.

_contextSnippet: There was no significant difference in the percentage of TUNEL positive cells between xenografts from animals receiving trastuzumab injections (0.24% ± 0.04%, mean ± SE) compared with saline injected animals (0.29% ± 0.09%, mean ± SE)
details: Did not significantly increase apoptosis: 0.24%±0.04% TUNEL positive cells vs 0.29%±0.09% in controls
